mapper.insert: INSERT INTO privacy_export_task( user_id, scope_json, format, status, file_name, file_path, fail_reason ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{scopeJson}, #{format}, #{status}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{failReason} )
mapper.update: UPDATE privacy_export_task SET status = #{status}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_path = #{filePath}, expire_at = #{expireAt}, fail_reason = '', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE privacy_export_task SET status = 4, fail_reason = #{failReason}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE privacy_export_task SET status = 3, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 2 AND expire_at IS NOT NULL AND expire_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, scope_json, format, status, file_name, file_path, expire_at, fail_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM privacy_export_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, user_id, scope_json, format, status, file_name, file_path, expire_at, fail_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM privacy_export_task WHERE id = #{taskId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, user_id, scope_json, format, status, file_name, file_path, expire_at, fail_reason, created_at, updated_at FROM privacy_export_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO privacy_delete_task( user_id, verify_type, account_snapshot, reason, status, cooling_off_expire_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{verifyType}, #{accountSnapshot}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{coolingOffExpireAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, verify_type, account_snapshot, reason, status, cooling_off_expire_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM privacy_delete_task WHERE id = #{taskId} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id, verify_type, account_snapshot, reason, status, cooling_off_expire_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM privacy_delete_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, verify_type, account_snapshot, reason, status, cooling_off_expire_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM privacy_delete_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (1, 2) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, verify_type, account_snapshot, reason, status, cooling_off_expire_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM privacy_delete_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND cooling_off_expire_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE privacy_delete_task SET status = 4, cancelled_at = #{cancelledAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{taskId} AND status = 1
UPDATE privacy_delete_task SET status = 3, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{taskId} AND status = 1
UPDATE user_device SET push_channel = 0, push_token = '', status = 2, last_active_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != 2

UPDATE app_user SET nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = '', email = NULL, phone = NULL, password_hash = NULL, gender = 0, signature = '', status = 2, last_login_at = NULL, is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE review SET user_id = 0, user_name = #{nickname}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE review_comment SET user_id = 0, user_name = #{nickname}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE review_report SET reporter_user_id = 0, reporter_user_name = #{nickname}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE reporter_user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, shop_id, region, user_name, content, score_overall, score_taste, score_env, score_service, cost, currency, like_count, comment_count, audit_status, audit_remark, status, is_deleted, tags, created_at, updated_at FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id,user_id,region,user_name,title,content,content_type,shop_id,deal_id,like_count,comment_count,repost_count, audit_status,audit_remark,status,created_at,updated_at FROM post WHERE user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT pr.id,pr.post_id,pr.user_id,pr.region,pr.created_at, p.title AS post_title,p.user_id AS post_user_id,p.user_name AS post_user_name FROM post_repost pr LEFT JOIN post p ON p.id=pr.post_id WHERE pr.user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY pr.id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT pr.post_id FROM post_repost pr LEFT JOIN post p ON p.id=pr.post_id WHERE pr.user_id=#{userId} OR p.user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY pr.post_id
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_repost WHERE user_id=#{userId} OR post_id IN (SELECT id FROM post WHERE user_id=#{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET repost_count=(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_repost WHERE post_id=#{postId}) WHERE id=#{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, o.deal_id, o.shop_id, o.region, o.quantity, o.unit_price, o.amount, o.currency, o.pay_method, o.pay_status, o.status, o.paid_at, o.expire_at, o.created_at, d.title AS deal_title, s.name AS shop_name, d.cover_image FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN deal d ON d.id = o.deal_id LEFT JOIN shop s ON s.id = o.shop_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.id DESC

SELECT r.id, r.reservation_no, r.user_id, r.shop_id, r.slot_id, r.region, r.reserve_time, r.people_count, r.contact_name, r.contact_phone, r.remark, r.status, r.reschedule_count, r.created_at, s.name AS shop_name, s.cover_url AS cover_image, s.address, rs.start_time, rs.end_time, rs.confirm_mode, rs.cancel_before_minutes FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN shop s ON s.id = r.shop_id LEFT JOIN reservation_slot rs ON rs.id = r.slot_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.id DESC

SELECT f.id, f.user_id, f.target_type, f.target_id, f.created_at, CASE WHEN f.target_type = 1 THEN s.name ELSE '' END AS target_name, CASE WHEN f.target_type = 1 THEN s.cover_url ELSE '' END AS cover_url, CASE WHEN f.target_type = 1 THEN s.score ELSE NULL END AS score, CASE WHEN f.target_type = 1 THEN s.price_per_capita ELSE NULL END AS price_per_capita, CASE WHEN f.target_type = 1 THEN s.currency ELSE '' END AS currency, CASE WHEN f.target_type = 1 THEN s.address ELSE '' END AS address, CASE WHEN f.target_type = 1 THEN c.name ELSE '' END AS city_name, CASE WHEN f.target_type = 1 THEN a.name ELSE '' END AS area_name, CASE WHEN f.target_type = 1 THEN s.has_deal ELSE FALSE END AS has_deal, CASE WHEN f.target_type = 1 THEN s.open_now ELSE FALSE END AS open_now, CASE WHEN f.target_type = 1 THEN s.tags ELSE '' END AS tags FROM user_favorite f LEFT JOIN shop s ON f.target_type = 1 AND s.id = f.target_id LEFT JOIN city c ON c.id = s.city_id LEFT JOIN area a ON a.id = s.area_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.id DESC
SELECT id, user_id, type, action, biz_id, change_amount, balance_after, remark, created_at FROM growth_points_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, user_id, region, keyword, search_type, created_at, updated_at FROM search_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT u.id AS user_id,u.nickname,f.created_at AS followed_at FROM user_follow f JOIN app_user u ON u.id=f.followed_user_id WHERE f.follower_user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC,f.id DESC
SELECT u.id AS user_id,u.nickname,f.created_at AS followed_at FROM user_follow f JOIN app_user u ON u.id=f.follower_user_id WHERE f.followed_user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC,f.id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_follow WHERE follower_user_id=#{userId} OR followed_user_id=#{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_notification SET actor_user_id=NULL,content='已注销用户曾关注了你',link_url='' WHERE actor_user_id=#{userId} AND type='social.follow'
mapper.select: SELECT id,user_a AS userA,user_b AS userB,last_message_preview AS lastMessagePreview,last_message_at AS lastMessageAt,created_at AS createdAt FROM conversation WHERE user_a=#{userId} OR user_b=#{userId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id,conversation_id AS conversationId,from_user_id AS fromUserId,to_user_id AS toUserId,content,is_read AS `read`,read_at AS readAt,created_at AS createdAt FROM message WHERE from_user_id=#{userId} OR to_user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_block WHERE user_id=#{userId} OR blocked_user_id=#{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET from_user_id=CASE WHEN from_user_id=#{userId} THEN 0 ELSE from_user_id END, to_user_id=CASE WHEN to_user_id=#{userId} THEN 0 ELSE to_user_id END, content=CASE WHEN from_user_id=#{userId} THEN '消息已因账号注销移除' ELSE content END, is_read=CASE WHEN to_user_id=#{userId} THEN TRUE ELSE is_read END, read_at=CASE WHEN to_user_id=#{userId} AND read_at IS NULL THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE read_at END WHERE from_user_id=#{userId} OR to_user_id=#{userId}
UPDATE message_report SET reporter_user_id=0 WHERE reporter_user_id=#{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id,c.name,c.region,cm.created_at AS joinedAt FROM circle_member cm JOIN circle c ON c.id=cm.circle_id WHERE cm.user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY cm.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE circle SET member_count=CASE WHEN member_count>0 THEN member_count-1 ELSE 0 END,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id IN (SELECT circle_id FROM circle_member WHERE user_id=#{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT t.id,t.name,t.region,tf.created_at AS followed_at FROM topic_follow tf JOIN topic t ON t.id=tf.topic_id WHERE tf.user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY tf.id DESC
SELECT topic_id FROM topic_follow WHERE user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE topic SET follower_count=(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM topic_follow WHERE topic_id=#{topicId}), updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{topicId}
